name: Score Doubler
challenge: If any player makes birdie, they choose one opponent whose game points are canceled or doubled negatively.
rulesText: Manual effect card. Resolve cancellation or negative doubling per group agreement when triggered.

name: Longest Drive Bonus
challenge: Longest drive in play gets +2.
rulesText: After hole, award +2 to golfer with longest in-play drive.

name: Closest to Pin Bonus
challenge: On par 3s, closest to the pin gets +2.
rulesText: On par 3, award +2 to closest tee shot in regulation.

name: Shared Pain
challenge: If any player makes double bogey or worse, every other player gets +1.
rulesText: If triggered, award +1 to all non-triggering golfers.

name: Sabotage Token
challenge: First player to complete mission assigns -1 to any opponent.
rulesText: First mission finisher chooses one opponent to receive -1.

name: Copycat
challenge: If two players complete the same style of achievement, both get +1 extra.
rulesText: Award +1 each to matching achievement pair when applicable.

name: Lone Wolf
challenge: Only one player may score mission points. First to complete locks everyone else out.
rulesText: Manual lockout effect; only first successful player receives mission points.

name: Comeback Card
challenge: Player currently last in game score gets +1 bonus if they complete any mission.
rulesText: Identify current last-place golfer and award +1 if they complete mission.

name: Pressure Cooker
challenge: If you miss a putt inside 4 feet, you cannot score mission points.
rulesText: Manual disqualification from mission points if short putt is missed.

name: No Safe Plays
challenge: Layups do not count for mission rewards unless card explicitly allows it.
rulesText: Manual constraint: layups cannot satisfy mission conditions unless stated.

name: Birdie Bounty
challenge: Any birdie is worth +2 extra game points.
rulesText: Award additional +2 to any golfer making birdie.

name: Bogey Tax
challenge: Any player making double bogey or worse gets -1 game point.
rulesText: Apply -1 to golfers who post double bogey or worse.

name: Long Putt Special
challenge: Any made putt over 10 feet is worth +1 extra.
rulesText: Award +1 extra when golfer holes a putt longer than 10 feet.

name: Target Golf
challenge: Approach shots on green earn +1 extra if player also avoids a 3-putt.
rulesText: Award +1 if golfer hits approach to green and completes hole without 3-putt.

name: Chaos Swap
challenge: Hole winner in game points may swap one point with any other player.
rulesText: Manual swap effect: winner transfers 1 point with chosen opponent.

name: Revenge Hole
challenge: Player with lowest game points on previous hole gets first tie-break rights on this hole.
rulesText: Manual tie-break priority effect for previous-hole lowest scorer.

name: Team Trouble
challenge: If one player finds water, every other player making bogey or better gets +1.
rulesText: When water is found, award +1 to other golfers finishing bogey or better.

name: Jackpot Hole
challenge: All mission rewards on this hole are worth +1 extra.
rulesText: Add +1 bonus to every successfully completed mission reward.

name: Double Trouble
challenge: If two or more players fail their missions, all successful players gain +1 extra.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. If two or more players fail their missions, all successful players gain +1 extra. Apply +1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Rich Get Richer
challenge: Current game leader earns +1 if they complete any mission this hole.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Current game leader earns +1 if they complete any mission this hole. Apply +1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Robin Hood
challenge: Current game leader loses 1 point if they fail; last place gains 1 if they succeed.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Current game leader loses 1 point if they fail; last place gains 1 if they succeed.

name: Par 3 Panic
challenge: On a par 3, anyone missing the green cannot earn mission points.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. On a par 3, anyone missing the green cannot earn mission points. Apply 0 points based on selected resolution.

name: The Collector
challenge: Any player who completes their mission and makes par or better steals 1 point from the current leader.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. A player who succeeds and makes par or better steals 1 point from current leader.

name: Heat Check
challenge: If the same player succeeds on three holes in a row, they gain +2 extra here.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. If the same player succeeds on three holes in a row, they gain +2 extra here. Apply +2 points based on selected resolution.

name: Freeze Out
challenge: The previous hole's winner cannot earn bonus points from Chaos this hole.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Previous hole winner cannot receive this hole's chaos bonus.

name: Mercy Rule
challenge: Any player in last place gets +1 just for completing a Common card this hole.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Any player in last place gets +1 just for completing a Common card this hole. Apply +1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Group Project
challenge: If everyone in the group makes bogey or better, everyone gets +1.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. If everyone in the group makes bogey or better, everyone gets +1. Apply +1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Disaster Dividend
challenge: If any player cards triple bogey or worse, all other players get +2.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. If any player cards triple bogey or worse, all other players get +2. Apply +2 points based on selected resolution.

name: Clutch Multiplier
challenge: Any made putt over 12 feet is worth +2 instead of +1 bonus.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. A made putt over 12 feet is worth +2 bonus instead of +1.

name: Fairway Tax
challenge: Any player missing the fairway on a par 4 or 5 loses 1 game point unless their mission specifically involves recovery.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Missing fairway on par 4/5 loses 1 game point unless mission is recovery-based.

name: Bonus for Bravery
challenge: Any player completing a Risk card this hole gets +1 extra.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Any player completing a Risk card this hole gets +1 extra. Apply +1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Commoner's Relief
challenge: Any player completing a Common card this hole gets +1 extra if they are currently last in game points.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Any player completing a Common card this hole gets +1 extra if they are currently last in game points. Apply +1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Clean Card Bonus
challenge: Any player who completes their mission and avoids a penalty stroke gets +1 extra.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Any player who completes their mission and avoids a penalty stroke gets +1 extra. Apply +1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Shared Glory
challenge: If every player completes their personal mission, everyone gets +2.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. If every player completes their personal mission, everyone gets +2. Apply +2 points based on selected resolution.

name: Only Pars Matter
challenge: Any player making par or better earns +1 game point, even if they fail their mission.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Any player making par or better earns +1 game point, even if they fail their mission. Apply +1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Miss and Pay
challenge: Any player who 3-putts loses 1 game point.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Any player who 3-putts loses 1 game point. Apply -1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Kingmaker
challenge: The player with the best real score on the hole may give +1 to any other player.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Hole best real-score player may grant +1 to any other player.

name: Tight Race
challenge: If two or more players tie for best game points on the hole, all tied players get +1 extra.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. If two or more players tie for best game points on the hole, all tied players get +1 extra. Apply +1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Fail Forward
challenge: Any player who fails their mission but still makes bogey or better gains +1.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Any player who fails their mission but still makes bogey or better gains +1. Apply +1 points based on selected resolution.

name: Spotlight Hole
challenge: The current real-score leader cannot earn Chaos bonus points this hole.
rulesText: Manual chaos resolution. Current real-score leader is ineligible for chaos bonus on this hole.
